content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Mashmokh and ACM". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/414/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the maximum number of elements that can be removed from the array.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the array and then remove the minimum number of elements to make all elements equal.
